quicker-ui.title: 打开 Quicker 界面
quicker-ui.description: 打开 Quicker 设置页与常用窗口（动作回收站、常规设置、搜索框、进程场景设置）。Use when the user asks to open a Quicker UI page/window.

overview.title: 总览
overview.description: Quicker 动作无头编辑总览：文档层级、P0–P7 索引与专题路由。Use when starting action editing or choosing which guide topic to read next.

authoring-workflow.title: 写动作流程
authoring-workflow.description: Quicker 动作编辑 P1–P7 主流程。Use before the first action edit in a session.
authoring-workflow.allowed-tools: qkrpc_action_create qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit

workspace-editing.title: 工作区编辑
workspace-editing.description: .quicker/actions layout; workspace_action_*_data and workspace_action_file_* (id + files/…); patch saves. Use when editing on disk.
workspace-editing.allowed-tools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit
workspace-editing.compatibility: QuickerAgent; requires working directory in sidebar

action-variables.title: 动作变量
action-variables.description: data.json 中 variables[] 的类型、defaultValue；quicker_in_param 边界。步骤参数绑定见 action-steps。Use when editing action variables.

action-steps.title: 动作步骤
action-steps.description: data.json steps[]：stepRunnerKey、inputParams/outputParams、ifSteps；长 inputParams.value (>4 lines) use files/ + file ref not inline value. Use before step-runner get.
action-steps.allowed-tools: qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit qkrpc_action_patch

action-icons.title: 动作图标
action-icons.description: Font Awesome fa: spec and http(s) image URLs for action metadata and context menus. Use before set-metadata icon or guessing fa:Light_* names.

patch-workflow.title: Patch 工作流（CLI）
patch-workflow.description: CLI 内联 action patch JSON 形状（qkrpc action patch --patch-file）。

step-runner-search.title: 步骤模块搜索
step-runner-search.description: step-runner 目录搜索语法（OR、通配、sys:*）。Use when finding a step module key before qkrpc_step_runner_get.

step-runner-get.title: 步骤模块 schema
step-runner-get.description: Agent 专用 step-runner get：压缩 schema、与 search 分工；禁止 get-ui。Use after search, before writing inputParams.

implementation-fallback.title: 实现选型与回退
implementation-fallback.description: P4 回退选型：须先排除 expressions/evalexpression，再考虑 sys:csscript vs runScript。Use when no dedicated step module fits after checking expressions.

expressions.title: 表达式与插值
expressions.description: P4 首选：$=、$$ 与 sys:evalexpression（LINQ/字符串/JSON/多变量赋值）。Prefer before sys:csscript for data transforms.

subprogram-workflow.title: 子程序
subprogram-workflow.description: 公共子程序与动作内子程序的区别及调用工作流。Use when adding subprogram call steps or editing subprogram projects.

action-organization-workflow.title: 动作整理
action-organization-workflow.description: 整理动作位置：list/search（含 uses: 引用查找）、move、全局页 create/reorder、虚拟进程 process ensure 批量归集。Use when tidying action pages, moving actions, or grouping by subprogram reference — not for editing steps.
action-organization-workflow.allowed-tools: qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_move qkrpc_profile_create qkrpc_profile_reorder qkrpc_process_ensure

action-project-files.title: 工作区项目布局
action-project-files.description: .quicker/actions/{actionId} 目录、data.json 与 files/ 外置 {file} 引用形状。Use when authoring file refs on disk.

action-embedded-subprograms.title: 动作内子程序
action-embedded-subprograms.description: 动作内子程序：subprograms/{subId}/ 目录与根 data.json 不含内联 subPrograms 的磁盘模型。

form-spec.title: 多字段表单
form-spec.description: sys:form：默认 formDef.file + files/*.form.json (qkrpc.form.v1)；长表单勿内联 formDef.value。Use when authoring sys:form.

common-operation-item.title: 操作项文本语法
common-operation-item.description: CommonOperationItem 多行文本：动作 ContextMenuData 右键菜单、[图标]标题(提示)|数据、子菜单与 quicker_in_param。Use when editing action context menus or SelectionItems-shaped text.
common-operation-item.allowed-tools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_action_patch qkrpc_fa_search workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_edit_data

step-modules.title: 步骤模块用法
step-modules.description: Quicker 步骤模块精简参考：分类目录、用途、控制模式与 KC 文档摘要。Use after step-runner search, before/alongside qkrpc_step_runner_get; docs_get_reference topic step-modules.
